questions.question: What is the main subject doing in this clip?
questions.answer_key: A person is walking or moving through snow
questions.rationale: Establishes primary action and subject for the entire clip

questions.question: What is the setting or environment where this activity takes place?
questions.answer_key: A snowy outdoor area, possibly a street or path
questions.rationale: Essential context for understanding the travel scenario and conditions

questions.question: What is visible on the ground in the snow?
questions.answer_key: Footprints and rope or cord marks in the snow
questions.rationale: Indicates equipment or safety measures being used during the activity

questions.question: What color is the visible equipment or object in the lower frames?
questions.rationale: Helps identify specific gear being used in the snowy conditions

questions.question: How many people are visible in this clip?
questions.answer_key: At least two people in dark winter clothing
questions.rationale: Clarifies whether this is a solo or group travel activity
